Tests the `toString` method of the boolean value `true` in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `toString` method on a boolean value in JavaScript. It verifies that calling `toString` on the boolean value `true` returns the string `"true"`. This test ensures that the `toString` method correctly converts a boolean to its string representation, which is a fundamental operation in JavaScript. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on the correctness of the `toString` method for boolean values.
